summary: Sprint T1 — Native Trading Runtime backend testing complete. 25/25 pytest tests passed against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Verdict fusion (TA + sentiment + fractal), opportunities scan, paper-trading book (submit/duplicate-guard/positions/orders/events/close/evaluate-hits/account-update), legacy /api/terminal/* honest-404, and existing cognition endpoints (TA/sentiment/fractal/miniapp/panel) all behave per spec.
critical_code_review_comments: trading_runtime.py reads cognition layers in-process (no HTTP loop-back) — matches sprint contract.
Verdict engine excludes Mongo _id via projection on every read — no ObjectId leakage.
Duplicate position guard works (returns ok:false / error='position_already_open').
Override flow correctly derives entry/stop/target from current price + support/resistance even when underlying verdict is WAIT.
Events ledger captures both ORDER_FILLED and POSITION_CLOSED with timestamps.
Account stats (totalTrades, wins, losses, balanceUsd, realizedPnlUsd) updated atomically on close.
Legacy /api/terminal/* and /api/terminal-app/* return honest 404 (sidecar properly retired).
Module size: trading_runtime.py is ~670 lines — borderline against 700-line guideline; consider splitting verdict engine and paper book into sub-modules in a future sprint (NOT blocking).
No async/await issues — all blocking pymongo calls correctly wrapped with asyncio.to_thread in routes layer.
seed_data_creation: Used a dedicated test account 'TEST_t1_paper_acct' (auto-created by _ensure_account). One LONG BTC position opened/closed during the run; cleanup helper closes any leftover OPEN positions before the flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trading Runtime T1 is stable. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_trading_runtime_t1.py covers status, verdict (BTC/ETH/SOL), opportunities, account, full paper flow (submit/duplicate/positions/orders/evaluate-hits/close/account-update/closed-listing/events), legacy 404, and cognition surfaces. Re-run via: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_trading_runtime_t1.py -v. Frontend skipped per request — UI for trading verdict/paper book has not been built yet.
